---
name: Bug report
about: Create a report to help us fix a problem
title: '[Bug] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Set `LLM_PROVIDER=...`
2. Run `...`
3. Observe `...`

## Expected behaviour

A clear description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual behaviour

What actually happened. Include the full error message / traceback if available.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g., Ubuntu 22.04]
- Python version: [e.g., 3.11.4]
- Branch / commit: [e.g., `main` @ `abc1234`]
- LLM provider: [e.g., `anthropic`, `groq`]

## Additional context

Any other context, screenshots, or log output that might help diagnose the issue.
